summary: Spec/plan/acceptance artifacts present but implementation not applied to templates or helper code; tests not updated.

requirement_checks.requirement: PASS review renders new Factory Review header without legacy clutter
evidence: scripts/templates/github-messages/review-pass-comment.md:1 contains legacy banner 'Autonomous review completed with decision **PASS**' (file shows old format)
git diff origin/main...HEAD shows only .factory artifacts were added; templates were not changed: A .factory/runs/105/* (no changes to scripts/templates).

requirement_checks.requirement: REQUEST_CHANGES review shares layout and preserves detailed findings
evidence: rg '## Factory Review' found no matches in templates or tests; new header not present in templates.

requirement_checks.requirement: Traceability appears as a single collapsible block in both comment and review.md
evidence: scripts/lib/review-output.mjs: export function renderCanonicalTraceabilityMarkdown produces multiple '<details>' blocks (per-group) rather than a single '<details>' wrapper.
scripts/lib/review-artifacts.mjs and scripts/lib/review-output.mjs still call renderCanonicalTraceabilityMarkdown (no flattening change present).

requirement_checks.requirement: buildReviewConversationBody renders new Factory Review header and removes legacy artifacts footer
evidence:
scripts/lib/github-messages.mjs: buildReviewConversationBody constructs a footer '

—
Artifacts: `.../review.md`' and appends it to review.md; it does not render the new Factory Review header or inject artifacts as links in the top block.
git diff origin/main...HEAD shows no modifications to scripts/lib/github-messages.mjs in this branch.

requirement_checks.requirement: Review authoring guidance omits manual methodology instruction
evidence: .factory/prompts/review.md: the prompt still instructs 'Apply the active methodology `{{METHODOLOGY_NAME}}`' and 'Include the methodology used ({{METHODOLOGY_NAME}})' in the review.md, which will duplicate methodology when summary block is injected.

requirement_checks.requirement: Tests updated to assert new comment layout and flattened traceability
evidence: git diff origin/main...HEAD shows no updates to test files (tests/github-messages.test.mjs and snapshots remain unchanged).
Repository search for 'Factory Review' returned no matches in tests or templates.

findings.title: PASS template still uses legacy banner/footer
findings.details: The PASS review template (`scripts/templates/github-messages/review-pass-comment.md`) still contains the legacy 'Autonomous review completed' banner and a trailing artifacts footer instead of the new compact '## Factory Review' summary with artifact links.
findings.recommendation: Update `review-pass-comment.md` to the target layout: top '## Factory Review', decision/method line, bold Summary/Findings/Artifacts lines with links, and remove legacy banner/footer. Update tests to assert this change.

findings.title: REQUEST_CHANGES template still uses legacy layout
findings.details: The REQUEST_CHANGES review template (`scripts/templates/github-messages/review-request-changes.md`) repeats the old plain 'Summary' line and includes the legacy artifacts section and full review details token instead of the new shared header and flattened traceability block.
findings.recommendation: Replace the REQUEST_CHANGES template body with the shared Factory Review header layout, ensure the blocking findings detail block appears appropriately, and update tests/snapshots.

findings.title: Traceability rendering not flattened
findings.details: `scripts/lib/review-output.mjs` still emits multiple `<details>` blocks (one per requirement group) in `renderCanonicalTraceabilityMarkdown`, contrary to the spec which requires a single `<details>` wrapper with flat subsections.
findings.recommendation: Refactor `renderCanonicalTraceabilityMarkdown` (or replace it) to return a single '<details>' element with summary '🧭 Traceability' and flat Markdown subsections for each requirement group. Update callers and tests accordingly.

findings.title: Conversation body builder still appends legacy artifacts footer
findings.details: `scripts/lib/github-messages.mjs` `buildReviewConversationBody` builds a `footer` containing an 'Artifacts: `.../review.md`' line and appends it to the review body; it does not render the new top summary block as specified.
findings.recommendation: Modify `buildReviewConversationBody` to accept parsed `review.json`, render the new Factory Review header with artifact links, and then append the canonical `review.md` without adding the legacy footer. Ensure truncation logic anchors on the new traceability summary.

findings.title: Tests and CI need to assert new layout
findings.details: Unit tests currently pass, but they do not validate the new header, artifact links, or flattened traceability formatting. Without updated tests, regressions or partial implementations could be merged unnoticed.
findings.recommendation: Update `tests/github-messages.test.mjs`, `tests/process-review.test.mjs`, and relevant snapshots to assert the new Factory Review header, artifact links, and that only one '<details>' wrapper is present in traceability. Run CI to ensure coverage.
